LandingInfo.trustedBy: Trusted by software engineers at top tier tech companies
LandingInfo.howItWorksTitle: Deep Dive: How our ATS AI Works
LandingInfo.howItWorksSubtitle: Our system reverse-engineers ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems) to ensure your CV passes automated resume screeners.
LandingInfo.step1Desc: We parse your PDF CV and map every skill, impact metric, and framework precisely like an ATS algorithm.
LandingInfo.step2Desc: Google Gemini cross-references your profile against the precise job description to detect missing mandatory keywords.
LandingInfo.step3Desc: We instantly generate a flawless, highly targeted cover letter packed with the matched ATS terms in the job's native language.
LandingInfo.useCasesSubtitle: Whether you're breaking into tech or aiming for a Staff Engineer role.
LandingInfo.juniorDesc: Highlight transferable skills and structure academic projects to hit your first entry-level ATS requirements.
LandingInfo.midDesc: Focus on metrics, tech stacks, and scaling impact. Locate the missing buzzwords holding you back from senior interviews.
LandingInfo.seniorDesc: Translate complex architectural achievements into the precise business and technical language strict ATS systems look for.
LandingInfo.faq1Q: How does this tool help bypass ATS resume screeners?
LandingInfo.faq1A: Our system reverse-engineers standard ATS rules by comparing your CV against the specific job description. We highlight exact missing keywords and formatting flaws, ensuring your resume speaks the language the ATS parser expects to pass you to a human recruiter.
LandingInfo.faq2Q: Does this work for non-English job descriptions?
LandingInfo.faq2A: Absolutely. We support 14 native languages. You can input your CV in English and automatically generate an ATS-optimized cover letter seamlessly translated into the target language of the specific local job, capturing native tech nuances.
LandingInfo.faq3Q: Is my PDF CV data secure?
LandingInfo.faq3A: Yes, your privacy is paramount. Your PDF is parsed in secure memory. We do not sell your personal data or use your resume to train open AI models. It is analyzed exclusively to score your match against the job you select.
LandingInfo.bottomCtaSubtitle: Start mapping your CV for free right now.
LandingInfo.footer: © {year} Smart Tech Job Aggregator. All rights reserved.
